title: centaurea absinthifolia
intro: Centaurea absinthifolia, also known as the athanasia or absinthe wormwood, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centaurea absinthifolia include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Centaurea absinthifolia can be prepared into various herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and relieve symptoms of various conditions.
